rag_rules: When AGREE reports a type error on a line, trace the first invalid identifier or helper declaration and fix or remove it.
If a guarantee expression has type '<error>', ensure all referenced identifiers are visible and properly typed in the same annex.
generic_rules: In AGREE contracts, only reference visible AADL features or declared helpers within the same annex scope.
Use only AGREE-supported scalar types: int, real, bool for constants and equation declarations.
Avoid placing implementation-specific subcomponent paths in component type annexes.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks.
Assignments in implementation scopes must reference existing output features or declared auxiliary variables.
anti_patterns: Do not introduce package-qualified identifiers or types not present in the AADL model's configured dependencies.
Do not place guarantee statements in implementation scope; use only assumptions and equations there.
